en.value:
Activity 1: Start up, Review and Coordination Meetings

Inception meetings


	Quarterly review meetings
	Results dissemination workshops at district level
	Staff orientation and planning
	VDC level interaction meetings in new VDCs


Activity 2: VSLA formalization and Cooperative Registration

Cooperative awareness education


	ToT on delivering community training on formal and informal protection measures
	Cooperative education and community training
	Cooperative registration documentation
	New cooperative registration or MoU with existing Cooperatives


Activity 3: Financial Literacy Training (FLT)


	FLT material design & production (training manual, Text Book, flip chart and posters)
	Training of trainers
	Refresher training to facilitators
	Orientation to cooperative representatives
	Training delivery to participants
	FLT review and feedback workshops


Activity 4: SACCO and DCU Capacity Building Training


	General TOT for LRPs
	Cooperative account management training
	On the spot technical support for accounting and record keeping
	Saving/credit management training
	Good governance in cooperatives
	Leadership capacity development training
	PEARLS monitoring training
	On the spot technical support to SACCOs on governance system
	Business plan training
	Cooperative management training
	DSU capacity building support
	Review workshop of on the spot technical support on accounting
	Review workshop of on the spot technical support on governance
	Review and follow up workshop on business plan
	Technical support to program team and DSU through Cooperative specialist


Activity 5: Material, equipment and furniture support for Cooperative Establishment and Strengthening


	Printed stationary Support to cooperatives
	Furniture support to cooperatives
	Safe Vault support to cooperatives
	Compute/printer support to cooperatives
	MIS software installation and training
	Equipment & liquidity management support for SACCOs delivering remittance services


Activity 6: Linkage and networking

Wholesale loan access workshop

Activity 7: Monitoring & Evaluation (M&E)


	Social audit
	Half yearly bulletin publication
	Joint monitoring visits
	Documentation and dissemination of best practices including short documentary
	Monitoring & Supervision of SACCOs by CPO,PO & PC
	D-PAC meeting
	C-PAC meeting
	SACCO capacity assessment
	Research, case studies and documentary
	Results dissemination workshop and close-out workshop at national level
	Endline evaluation
	SWC evaluation


Activity 8: Piloting and Implementation of Youth Financial Literacy


	Financial literacy TOT to youth representatives
	Financial literacy training (piloting ) to youths
	Youth financial literacy review and feedback workshop
	Financial literacy TOT to youths ( for roll out)
	Financial literacy training to youths ( roll out)


Activity 9: Linkage of SACCOs with remittance companies/agents


	Orientation to cooperative leaders on insurance and remittances
	Interactive workshop for Remittance and Insurance Agencies and SACCOs


 

Activity 10:  Other Program Support


	Capacity building training to project staff
	Design, documentation and modification of financial products
	Modification of YFLT materials

en.full: Sustainable Access to Finance and Livelihoods II (SAFAL II)

sectors.donor_sector: Executive and legislative organs, financial and fiscal affairs, external   affairs
sectors.normalized_sector: Executive and legislative organs, financial and fiscal affairs, external   affairs

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
